title: Cyber Underwriting NA
summary: Aimed at streamlining the quote generation process for Cyber Insurance using GenAI to enhance risk selection and support expected rapid growth. The existing risk selection process was entirely manual, causing delays in underwriting and resulting in lost business.
outcomes: 55% increase in bound policies NA · 43% EO
fromSteps: Broker submits via email or portal
Underwriter manually reviews documents
Risk data keyed into system manually
Judgment applied to price and assess
Quote issued — avg. 3–5 days

toSteps.l: Broker submission received
AI extracts and structures risk data
Risk scoring agent assesses exposure vs. appetite
Quote recommendation with rationale generated
Underwriter reviews and issues quote

financial: ~$3.2M NB GWP uplift for NA Cyber (R1+R2)
~$6.1M NB GWP uplift for EO Cyber (R1)
governance: Consistent risk selection criteria across all submissions
Full audit trail of AI vs. underwriter decisions
Documented pricing rationale supporting regulatory compliance

title: Q-GPT
summary: BEQ's managed, secure interface to ChatGPT capabilities — delivering governed, persona-based AI across 2,237 users spanning 912 business teams with full audit trails and enterprise-grade data controls.
outcomes: 75% effort reduction for Legal, Risk & Data Science
Secure data estate — no public ChatGPT dependency
fromSteps: Employee uses public ChatGPT
Sensitive documents uploaded to unsecured LLM
No prompt standardisation or governance
No audit trail
Data privacy risk unmanaged

toSteps.l: Employee accesses Q-GPT — secure BEQ interface
Azure GPT-4o ingests documents within BEQ network
Persona-based experience surfaces role-relevant prompts
Curated prompt library ensures quality outputs
Audit trails and access controls enforced

financial: 75% effort reduction for Legal, Risk & Data Science
Eliminates cost and risk of unsanctioned LLM usage
operational: Precise data insights from ingested documents
governance: Secure data estate — no public ChatGPT dependency
Centralised model lifecycle management with audit trails

title: EventOps Agent
summary: Agentic AI ingesting, deduplicating, correlating and root-cause-analysing events across monitoring platforms — cutting mean diagnosis time from 5 hours to 30 minutes and reducing P1/P2 escalations.
fromSteps: Alerts generated across multiple monitoring platforms
Manual correlation to identify true events
Manual diagnostic across Alert Center, Dynatrace
Manual drill-down and RCA with limited automation
Finalise RCA and execute corrective actions

toSteps.l: Events ingested from monitoring tools (idera, Dynatrace etc.)
Deduplication & categorisation agent removes duplicates
Correlation & clustering agent groups events into problems
RCA agent generates summaries and actionable insights
Core team confirms RCA and executes remediation

financial: Improved engineering productivity via automated correlation/RCA
operational: Fewer P1/P2 escalations by preventing missed alerts
Faster diagnosis and proactive risk management
governance: Standardised and repeatable incident investigation process
Better accountability through centralised event intelligence

title: Smart Capacity Agent
summary: Agentic AI pulling raw capacity data from Storage, Backup and VMware, synthesising utilisation insights, forecasting consumption and auto-raising ServiceNow tickets — replacing 90 hours of manual effort with 5.
outcomes: Automated ServiceNow ticketing with owner assignment
fromSteps: RAW data extracted manually from Storage, Backup, VMware teams
ServiceNow team manually collates into a single file
Capacity team manually analyses usage and plans actions
Team defines plan, actions assessment and publishes reports

toSteps.l: RAW capacity data pulled from Storage, Backup, VMware
Network Capacity Analyser collates data and derives % usage
Forecasting agent predicts consumption and sets action thresholds
Ticketing agent creates ServiceNow ticket and assigns owner
Capacity team actions ticket and publishes report

financial: License cost optimisation and OpEx reduction
Improved FTE productivity from reduced manual effort
operational: Reduced availability risk and fewer outages
governance: Chatbot-enabled self-service reporting
Centralised visibility and auditability

title: Cognitive Data Mapping Agent
summary: AI-assisted mapping that learns from approved schemas and past mappings to accurately map unmapped fields — reducing manual effort by 70%, improving data quality, and creating a reusable foundation for downstream automation across migration programmes.
governance: Strong auditability and regulatory confidence

title: Go-NoGo Agent
summary: Autonomously troubleshoots incidents across Infra (Windows, Linux) and AMS (Reinsurance, ODM, Mainframe) — extracting ticket details, searching Quasar++ for relevant SOPs, presenting troubleshooting commands, and orchestrating remediation with human-in-the-loop approval.
fromSteps: Manually review the incident, log into servers, and perform initial checks
Analyze server conditions, identify symptoms such as CPU or memory spikes, and determine the likely cause
Assess root causes and recommend next steps
Manually implement the required fix and validate

toSteps.l: User enters the ticket number and a mapped workflow is triggered
Troubleshooting agent analyzes extracted ticket details and searches Quasar++ to present relevant troubleshooting commands
Agent commands are approved by the human in the loop
Remediation agent analyzes the output, determines the appropriate remediation steps, and displays them for approval
Output is peer reviewed and approved by the human in the loop before ticket is updated and closed

financial: Lower support effort and improved agent productivity
Reduced cost through faster diagnosis and resolution
operational: Reduced outage duration and SLA risk
governance: Better traceability and auditability
Human-in-the-loop control for safer execution

title: Automatic Ticket Assignment (ATA)
summary: Incident assignment validation ensures that IT incidents are accurately assigned to the appropriate teams based on ticket analysis from past tickets or expediting predefined rules — automating and validating the assignment process to reduce MTTR, improve SLA performance, and enhance customer experience.

title: Automatic Ticket Resolution
summary: GenAI is leveraged to do incident analysis and provides incident resolution recommendation for troubleshooting. It is deployed in myWizard with SOPs and past incident details uploaded in Quasar++ to enable intelligent, context-aware resolution.
governance: Consistent incident handling
Clear problem framing for SRE / ITSM / Ops leadership
End to end incident lifecycle coverage

title: Reverse Engineering Agent - .Net
summary: Analyses source code to inventory the application landscape, break large codebases into analyzable units, extract functional and technical insights, map business rules and dependencies back to source, and package the outputs into structured artifacts and interactive wiki documentation for transformation.
fromSteps: Receive incoming incident tickets in the support queue
Manually review ticket details to determine the likely resolver team
Check ticket completeness and correctness manually
Reassign incorrectly routed or incomplete tickets as required

toSteps.l: User submits source code and available business context to trigger the reverse engineering pipeline
Inventory Agent processes the codebase, identifies technologies, extensions, file coverage
Logical Grouping & Chunking Agents along with Functional and Technical Analysis Agents extract insights
Traceability & Feedback Agents and Retry on Failure Agents refine outputs, map business rules
Artifact Packager Agent generates structured knowledge assets and wiki-ready documentation

operational: Accelerated knowledge capture and reverse engineering at scale
Reduced transition effort and time required
Improved visibility of the broader technology estate and system dependencies

title: AI Innovation Studio
summary: One stop shop showcasing measurable value across the insurance value chain and technology delivery — from underwriting to claims to autonomous ops to efficient Technology Operations.
fromSteps: Analyze and Design architecture and key features
Build, Test and Deploy

toSteps.l: Provide curated prompts
Analyze, Design, Build, Test and Deploy

title: IntelliSQL Generator
summary: Translates the mapping rules from Cognitive Data Mapping Solution and generate the executable SQL scripts automatically that bridges the source and target systems, reducing the risk of human errors.
fromSteps: Map fields manually by checking all source and target tables
Review and Test all mapping

toSteps.l: Provide curated prompts
Analyze data and Generate SQL scripts
Review mappings
Testing insert scripts

title: EOL Tracker
summary: Provides a complete Application and Component level End of Life view across all regions.
fromSteps: Analyze and Design architecture and key features
Build, Test and Deploy

toSteps.l: Provide curated prompts
Analyze, Design, Build, Test and Deploy

operational: e2e exposure view enabling higher clarity and decision making

title: Agentic Knowledge Search
summary: AI agents interpret questions, decompose into sub-parts, execute parallel searches and produce cited grounded answers — reducing SME dependency and accelerating underwriter decisions.

title: Bordereau Processing Pilot
summary: AI to ingest, normalise, validate and transform incoming bordereaux files covering claims, premium, policy and DUA — eliminating manual intervention and improving data accuracy.

title: Invoice Processing Agent
summary: Automate claims invoice processing using Q-GPT–powered agents for scalable claims modernisation across NA.

title: Agentic UW — E&S Property
summary: Agent-led underwriting with a network of AI experts in a non-linear workflow evaluating complex E&S Property risks.

title: Future of Claims — NA
summary: Exploring how agentic AI transforms Demand Package Management, Litigation Management and key intervention points across NA claims.

title: Autonomous Ops Agent
summary: Troubleshooting agent diagnoses incidents by collecting health signals, correlating anomalies and routing through human-in-loop to remediation.

title: Reverse Engineering — Mainframe
summary: Analyses legacy code to extract application insights, generating knowledge documents that accelerate RCA and support modernisation programmes.

title: Reinsurance Modernisation — ARAMIS
summary: GenWizard automates data migration from legacy to Duck Creek by generating source-to-target mapping, SQL code and test cases.

title: Evergreening Agent
summary: Analyse change impact of security patching for code vulnerabilities across the application estate.

title: GitHub Copilot Spec Kit
summary: Standardises TDLC by embedding guardrails, requirements and test strategies into a structured AI-guided project workflow.
